headline: CommerceNext Growth Show Unveils Full 2026 Agenda for AI-Focused Retail Conference in New York
summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026--CommerceNext today announced the full agenda for the 2026 CommerceNext Growth Show, to be held June 23–24 in New York City.

content.title: CommerceNext Growth Show Unveils Full 2026 Agenda for AI-Focused Retail Conference in New York
content.summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026--CommerceNext today announced the full agenda for the 2026 CommerceNext Growth Show, to be held June 23–24 in New York City.

headline: Why Walmart and Other Consumer Stocks Aren’t Getting the Gains They Deserve
summary: Yardeni Research Contributing Editor Jackie Doherty highlights several companies she thinks delivered strong results in their latest quarters:  Dollar General  attracted more six-figure households and boosted its earnings-per-share target, while  Ulta Beauty  delivered broad-based growth.  RBC Capital Markets calls out Walmart and Ollie’s Bargain Outlet Holdings “as among the best positioned to navigate the current environment.”  Looking at the sector overall, both the  exchange-traded fund and the State Street Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR ETF are lower since the start of the year, even as the  is up double digits in percent terms.

content.title: Why Walmart and Other Consumer Stocks Aren’t Getting the Gains They Deserve
content.summary: Yardeni Research Contributing Editor Jackie Doherty highlights several companies she thinks delivered strong results in their latest quarters:  Dollar General  attracted more six-figure households and boosted its earnings-per-share target, while  Ulta Beauty  delivered broad-based growth.  RBC Capital Markets calls out Walmart and Ollie’s Bargain Outlet Holdings “as among the best positioned to navigate the current environment.”  Looking at the sector overall, both the  exchange-traded fund and the State Street Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR ETF are lower since the start of the year, even as the  is up double digits in percent terms.
